story_snippets:
- [ ] R1: Non-positive capacity raises ValueError at construction
- [ ] R2: Default tokens_available equals capacity
- [ ] R3: Successful consume reduces tokens and returns True
- [ ] R4: Failed consume preserves state and returns False
- [ ] R5: Refill never exceeds capacity
- [ ] R6: Partial refill adds the refill amount when below cap
formal:
R1:
  target: smt
  variables:
    capacity: Int
    raised_value_error: Bool
  assume: true
  predicate: capacity <= 0 => raised_value_error == true
  violation: capacity <= 0 && raised_value_error == false

story_snippets:
- [ ] R1: Non-positive capacity raises ValueError at construction
- [ ] R2: Default tokens_available equals capacity
- [ ] R3: Successful consume reduces tokens and returns True
- [ ] R4: Failed consume preserves state and returns False
- [ ] R5: Refill never exceeds capacity
- [ ] R6: Partial refill adds the refill amount when below cap
formal:
R2:
  target: smt
  variables:
    capacity: Int
    tokens_available: Int
    tokens_arg_provided: Bool
  assume: capacity > 0
  predicate: tokens_arg_provided == false => tokens_available == capacity
  violation: tokens_arg_provided == false && tokens_available != capacity

story_snippets:
- [ ] R1: Non-positive capacity raises ValueError at construction
- [ ] R2: Default tokens_available equals capacity
- [ ] R3: Successful consume reduces tokens and returns True
- [ ] R4: Failed consume preserves state and returns False
- [ ] R5: Refill never exceeds capacity
- [ ] R6: Partial refill adds the refill amount when below cap
formal:
R3:
  target: smt
  variables:
    capacity: Int
    prior_tokens_available: Int
    requested_tokens: Int
    tokens_available: Int
    result: Bool
  assume: capacity > 0 && prior_tokens_available >= 0 && prior_tokens_available <= capacity && requested_tokens >= 0
  predicate: requested_tokens <= prior_tokens_available => (result == true && tokens_available == prior_tokens_available - requested_tokens)
  violation: requested_tokens <= prior_tokens_available && (result == false || tokens_available != prior_tokens_available - requested_tokens)

story_snippets:
- [ ] R1: Non-positive capacity raises ValueError at construction
- [ ] R2: Default tokens_available equals capacity
- [ ] R3: Successful consume reduces tokens and returns True
- [ ] R4: Failed consume preserves state and returns False
- [ ] R5: Refill never exceeds capacity
- [ ] R6: Partial refill adds the refill amount when below cap
formal:
R4:
  target: smt
  variables:
    capacity: Int
    prior_tokens_available: Int
    requested_tokens: Int
    tokens_available: Int
    result: Bool
  assume: capacity > 0 && prior_tokens_available >= 0 && prior_tokens_available <= capacity && requested_tokens >= 0
  predicate: requested_tokens > prior_tokens_available => (result == false && tokens_available == prior_tokens_available)
  violation: requested_tokens > prior_tokens_available && (result == true || tokens_available != prior_tokens_available)

story_snippets:
- [ ] R1: Non-positive capacity raises ValueError at construction
- [ ] R2: Default tokens_available equals capacity
- [ ] R3: Successful consume reduces tokens and returns True
- [ ] R4: Failed consume preserves state and returns False
- [ ] R5: Refill never exceeds capacity
- [ ] R6: Partial refill adds the refill amount when below cap
formal:
R5:
  target: smt
  variables:
    capacity: Int
    prior_tokens_available: Int
    amount: Int
    tokens_available: Int
  assume: capacity > 0 && prior_tokens_available >= 0 && prior_tokens_available <= capacity && amount >= 0
  predicate: tokens_available <= capacity
  violation: tokens_available > capacity

story_snippets:
- [ ] R1: Non-positive capacity raises ValueError at construction
- [ ] R2: Default tokens_available equals capacity
- [ ] R3: Successful consume reduces tokens and returns True
- [ ] R4: Failed consume preserves state and returns False
- [ ] R5: Refill never exceeds capacity
- [ ] R6: Partial refill adds the refill amount when below cap
formal:
R6:
  target: smt
  variables:
    capacity: Int
    prior_tokens_available: Int
    amount: Int
    tokens_available: Int
  assume: capacity > 0 && prior_tokens_available >= 0 && prior_tokens_available <= capacity && amount >= 0
  predicate: (prior_tokens_available + amount) <= capacity => tokens_available == prior_tokens_available + amount
  violation: (prior_tokens_available + amount) <= capacity && tokens_available != prior_tokens_available + amount
